title: juriscan-verificador output
description: Output of the web verifier subagent. Whitelist enforcement is layered ON TOP of this schema: scripts/agent_io.py validate --agent verificador additionally checks that every source_url host matches references/whitelist_fontes.json (subdomain match allowed). An output can be schema-valid but whitelist-invalid; both must pass for the pipeline to consume it.

citacao_original.description: Exact citation as it appears in the legal piece.

source_url.description: URL actually fetched by WebFetch during this run. Whitelist enforcement is post-hoc.

access_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD date when the WebFetch was performed.

trecho_oficial.description: Literal snippet from the fetched page supporting the status. Required when status=CONFIRMADO or DIVERGENTE.

divergencia.description: When status=DIVERGENTE, short explanation of how the piece's use diverges from the official source.
